engineFlags.extraFlags: llama-benchy 0.3.6; --pp 128 --tg 128 --depth 0 --concurrency 1 --runs 30 --no-cache --no-adapt-prompt --latency-mode none --skip-coherence; first sample dropped; OpenAI stream token_ids verified/no benchy fallback.

notes: Qwen3.6-27B Q4_K_M GGUF on a single NVIDIA DGX Spark GB10. true non-speculative llama-server AR baseline with patched OpenAI streaming token_ids; no DFlash wrapper and no draft model. LocalMaxxing row uses Sherlock/thinkON pp=128,tg=128,c=1, N=29 warm median: tokSOut 10.3 tok/s (mean 10.24, std 0.27, range 9.51-10.60); TTFT/e2e first-token median 343.96 ms; tokSPrefill 372.13 tok/s; tokSTotal 20.04 tok/s. Variability is prompt/mode dependent: across the four N=29 cells, AR median 10.11-10.69, +DF 16.77-33.77, +DDT 25.11-55.17 tok/s; DDTree adds 1.50-1.63x over +DF. Companion true AR row; server patched only to expose token_ids for accurate llama-benchy accounting, not to change decode path. Raw JSON, commands, token_id smokes, and three-tier AR/+DF/+DDT discussion: https://github.com/my-other-github-account/spark-bench-reproducers/tree/main/luce-ddtree/submission and https://github.com/my-other-github-account/spark-bench-reproducers/tree/main/luce-ddtree. By @banana_baeee.
